```text
Bijux Atlas development control-plane

Options:

      --verbose                              
      --debug                                
      --fail-fast

      --print-boundaries                     
      --bijux-plugin-metadata                
      --umbrella-version <UMBRELLA_VERSION>  
      --repo-root <REPO_ROOT>                
      --output-format <OUTPUT_FORMAT>        [possible values: human, json, both]
      --no-deprecation-warn                  
  -h, --help                                 Print help
  -V, --version                              Print version

```
